notes: python_exe is the shared ml conda env (Python 3.11.15). ffmpeg was installed via winget (Gyan.FFmpeg 8.1.2) 2026-07-04; not yet on PATH in already-open shells, use full path or open a fresh shell. v2r_src is added to sys.path/PYTHONPATH read-only, to reuse v2r.syngen.gemini's REST client (Omni + Veo) and its certifi SSL workaround, without modifying that repo.
